description: Money-impact proposal with untrusted provenance and no top-level evidence entries fails the verifier under default PipelineOptions with PIC_VERIFIER_FAILED. The causal rule pinned here rejects the specific combination (money impact, provenance.trust='untrusted', no top-level evidence entries) as insufficient to proceed. Evidence-mode verification, which could change the outcome if sufficient evidence were present and verified, is out of scope here and deferred to v0.8.1+ conformance.
source: adapted from tests/conftest.py money_proposal fixture with provenance.trust flipped from 'trusted' to 'untrusted'; provenance[0].id is kept identical to core-allow-002-trusted-money so the paired-vector diff is a single-field flip; exercises the causal rule that under default PipelineOptions, money-impact proposals with untrusted provenance and without top-level evidence entries are rejected with PIC_VERIFIER_FAILED
